title: ArtifactReference
description: Protocol-owned artifact reference family with shared digest, size, content-type, data-class, and provenance linkage fields.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for artifact references.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this artifact reference.

digest.description: Content-addressed digest reference for the artifact payload bytes.

size_bytes.description: Exact artifact payload size in bytes.

content_type.description: Declared base media type for the artifact payload. Artifact references store only the base media type and do not carry MIME parameters such as charset or boundary.

data_class.description: Immutable artifact data-class label enforced by policy and flow-matrix checks.

provenance_receipt_hash.description: Hash of the provenance receipt that attests how this artifact was produced.
